parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsonBody: ={"contents": [{"parts": [{"text": "The stock NEPSE:{{$json.symbol}} has triggered a {{$json.triggerType}} alert because it reached Rs.{{$json.triggerTarget}}. Current price is Rs.{{$json.currentPrice}} (Open: {{$json.open}}, High: {{$json.high}}, Low: {{$json.low}}, Vol: {{$json.volume}}, Diff%: {{$json.changePercent}}%). Act as a professional NEPSE stock analyst. Based on this trigger, today's price range, and volume, give a highly concise 2-sentence recommendation: should the user sell to take profit, cut loss, or hold. Explain the price momentum."}]}]}

parameters.subject: =🚨 NEPSE Alert: {{$json.symbol}} ({{$json.triggerType}}) Reached! 🚨
parameters.message:
=

🚨 NEPSE Alert: {{$json.triggerType}}

Stock Risk Monitoring System

Today's High / Low Rs. {{$node["Scrape and Match Targets"].json.high}} / Rs. {{$node["Scrape and Match Targets"].json.low}}
Traded Volume {{$node["Scrape and Match Targets"].json.volume}}
Target Sell (Profit) Rs. {{$json.targetSellPrice || 'Not Set'}}
Target Loss (Stop Loss) Rs. {{$json.targetLossPrice || 'Not Set'}}
Daily Change = 0 ? '#28a745' : '#dc3545'}};">{{$node["Scrape and Match Targets"].json.changePercent}}%

{{$json.recommendation}}
